prompt.task: Update GitHub Projects during sprint execution and track progress

context_loading.instructions: Before proceeding, read the context documentation inventory: - Read: .claude/docs/.context-docs-inventory.xml Based on implementation needs, read relevant context: - For debugging issues: Read debugging/github-first-issues.md - For integration testing: Read debugging/integration-debugging.md - For performance analysis: Read debugging/performance-debugging.md - For database issues: Read debugging/database-debugging.md

available_tools.description: You have access to the following tools for tracking and updating execution status. Tool mappings are defined in .claude/tools/tool-mappings.xml and full documentation is in .claude/tools/available-tools.xml

tool.name: github_mcp
tool.usage: Update story status, manage PRs, track progress in GitHub

tool.name: browser_tools_mcp
tool.usage: Validate completed features, check for regressions

available_tools.tracking_guidelines: - Use github_mcp to update GitHub issue status automatically - Use TodoWrite to maintain detailed progress tracking - Use newrelic_mcp to monitor for performance regressions - Use browser_tools_mcp to validate UI changes - Update GitHub Projects fields throughout execution

step.title: Start Implementation
Create Pull Request
step.description: - Create PR: gh pr create --title "{STORY_TITLE}" --body "Closes #{STORY_NUMBER}" - PR will auto-move story to "Review" column - Update Implementation Phase: Testing

step.title: Complete Story
step.description: - Merge PR (auto-moves to "Done") - Update AI Context Status: Fresh - Add completion notes to story - Update Epic progress - Update Sprint Milestone issue: - Mark story as completed in the Selected Stories table - Update velocity metrics if all stories complete - Add daily standup notes for progress tracking

step.title: Sprint Milestone Updates
step.description: - Daily: Update Sprint Milestone issue (.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/sprint-milestone.md): - Add daily standup notes with progress and blockers - Update story status in the tracking table - Sprint End: - Calculate final velocity metrics - Add retrospective notes - Link to next sprint milestone

step.title: Load Implementation Context
step.description: Before implementing, load all necessary context: - Load project standards: Read CLAUDE.md - Load story context: Read .claude/contexts/story-{id}/context.md - Load technical notes: Read .claude/contexts/story-{id}/technical-notes.md - Load progress: Read .claude/contexts/story-{id}/progress.md - Review similar implementations in codebase

step.title: Implement Story Following TDD
step.description:
Test-Driven Development approach: 1. **Write Failing Tests First**: - Unit tests for business logic - Integration tests for user workflows - Follow patterns in testing/context/test-driven-development.md
2. **Implement Minimum Code**: - Write just enough code to make tests pass - Follow existing patterns in codebase - Use enhanceAction for all server actions - Validate all inputs with Zod schemas
3. **Refactor for Quality**: - Improve code structure while keeping tests green - Extract reusable components/utilities - Add proper TypeScript types (no 'any') - Ensure RLS security is maintained

step.title: Code Implementation Standards
step.description: Follow project standards from CLAUDE.md: - **Security**: Always use RLS, never expose API keys - **Validation**: Use Zod schemas for all inputs - **Components**: Prefer Server Components over Client Components - **Server Actions**: Always wrap with enhanceAction - **Error Handling**: Implement user-friendly error messages - **File Organization**: Follow existing patterns - **Testing**: Write tests alongside implementation

step.title: Implementation Workflow
step.description:
For each technical task in the story: 1. **Understand Context**: - Read relevant existing code - Identify patterns to follow - Check for reusable components
2. **Write Tests**: - Create test file if needed - Write test cases for expected behavior - Run tests to see them fail
3. **Implement Feature**: - Create/modify files as specified - Follow existing code patterns - Implement incrementally
4. **Validate Implementation**: - Run tests: pnpm test - Check types: pnpm typecheck - Fix linting: pnpm lint:fix
5. **Update Progress**: - Mark task complete in story issue - Update .claude/contexts/story-{id}/progress.md - Document any technical decisions

step.title: Common Implementation Patterns
step.description: Reference these common patterns: - **Server Actions**: apps/web/app/home/(user)/**/_actions/*.action.ts - **React Components**: packages/ui/src/*.tsx - **Database Schemas**: packages/supabase/src/schema/*.schema.ts - **API Routes**: apps/web/app/api/**/route.ts - **React Query**: packages/data/react-query-patterns.md - **Error Handling**: packages/errors/src/*.ts

step.title: Quality Checks Before PR
step.description: Before creating pull request: 1. **All Tests Pass**: pnpm test 2. **No Type Errors**: pnpm typecheck 3. **Code Formatted**: pnpm lint:fix 4. **Acceptance Criteria Met**: Review story requirements 5. **Documentation Updated**: Update relevant docs 6. **No Console Logs**: Remove debug statements 7. **Performance Checked**: No obvious bottlenecks 8. **Accessibility Verified**: WCAG compliance
